CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2020 Continued To Oct-14-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration As To Plaintiffs Taylor Sims And Mhaire "Mary" Fraser Or To Sever
Off Calendar Mar-18-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs SANKAET PATHAK, and SYNAPSE FINANCIAL TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration As To Plaintiffs Taylor Sims And Mhaire "Mary" Fraser Or To Sever:

Defendants Synapse Financial Technologies, Inc. and Sankaet Pathak's motion to compel arbitration is granted as to Plaintiffs Taylor Sims and Mhaire "Mary" Fraser.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
